name: chat-center
description: ЦентрЧатов — единое окно для мессенджеров с ИИ-помощником

scripts.setup-hooks: cp scripts/hooks/pre-commit .git/hooks/pre-commit && chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-commit && cp scripts/hooks/pre-push .git/hooks/pre-push && chmod +x .git/hooks/pre-push
scripts.test: node src/__tests__/isSpamText.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/navigateToChat.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/messengerConfigs.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/monitorPreload.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/overlayIcon.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/handleNewMessage.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/messageProcessing.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/mainProcess.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/appStructure.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/projectHealth.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/aiProviders.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/consoleMessageParser.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/ipcChannels.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/fileSizeLimits.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/memoryBankSizeLimits.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/featuresReferences.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/memoryLeaks.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/notifHooks.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/componentScope.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/hookOrder.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/mainImports.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/mainRuntime.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/mediaCacheQuota.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/unitRuntime.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/buildContract.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/storageErrors.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/aiErrors.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/extractedModules.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/smokeTest.test.cjs && node src/__tests__/integration.test.cjs && vitest run && electron-vite build && node e2e/app.e2e.cjs && node e2e/ui.e2e.cjs
